name: Notion
tone_of_voice: The brand communicates in a professional yet approachable manner, emphasizing efficiency and innovation.
target_audience: Primarily tech-savvy professionals and teams in various industries looking for productivity solutions, aged 25-45, who value collaboration and streamlined workflows.
style_notes: A modern and clean visual style with a focus on minimalism, using a palette of muted colors complemented by bold accents, and featuring sleek, sans-serif typography.
content_suggestions: Tips for maximizing productivity with Notion's features
User testimonials showcasing real-life applications of Notion in various industries
Behind-the-scenes looks at how teams use Notion to collaborate effectively
character_anchor: An ideal spokesperson is a young, diverse professional in their early 30s, with a friendly demeanor, dressed in smart-casual attire. They have short, well-groomed hair, wear glasses, and exude confidence and approachability, often seen interacting with a laptop or digital devices.
